opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't been to the toilet in nearly a week, my stomach is completely bloated, and the cramping is unbearable when I try to push.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has been getting worse over about six days and now the cramping is severe when I strain — I'm scared something is really blocked up inside.

symptom_narrative.character: bloated, crampy lower-tummy pain that comes in waves; a feeling that I'm blocked up at the back passage and can't fully empty
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramping is unbearable when I strain, though it settles for a bit if I manage to pass some wind
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down across the tummy and around the back passage
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes and goes in waves, worse when I try to go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: passing wind gives a bit of relief
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: straining to go makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very bloated and distended; last managed only small, hard, pellet-like stools about three days ago with a lot of straining
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had trouble going before and have sometimes had to press near the back passage with my finger to help things along
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: keeps going to the toilet without success; the discomfort is stopping me getting on with my day

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter docusate (stool softener) taken on and off, but it hasn't done anything

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling anxious that this could be something serious in the bowel

objective_data_offered.value: tummy looks and feels bloated and swollen
still passing wind, which gives brief relief
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report; a key discriminator against complete obstruction but not clinician-verified

objective_data_offered.value: no vomiting; last small hard stool was about 3 days ago
about 74 kg, and it has been steady
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported weight; supports absence of unintentional weight loss but not measured this encounter
